name: Credit Approval Decision
description: Determines whether a credit application should be approved based on applicant's credit score and income

name: Loan Eligibility Decision
description: Evaluates loan eligibility based on multiple factors including credit history, employment status, and debt-to-income ratio

name: Insurance Premium Calculation
description: Calculates insurance premium based on risk factors and coverage amount

name: Fraud Detection Decision
description: Identifies potentially fraudulent transactions based on transaction patterns and user behavior

name: Customer Discount Eligibility
description: Determines customer eligibility for various discount programs
